content: Published a blog post collecting together my thoughts regarding "Indexed-Fibred Duality", which I first started considering back in #learning: questions > ✔ Comma Categories vs Categories of Elements.
Looks great. Maybe you could give it an introduction with a short description of what the reader can/will learn from it
Thank you - I suppose the main goal of the post is to give some intuition for “fibrations”, which was one of the topics I was confused about for quite a long time.
Also thank you for citing "Categorical Logic and Type Theory", that book looks interesting.
A quick follow-up article to my last post, explaining how to apply Indexed-Fibred duality to defining Infinitary Cartesian Products.
